case_title: DAGOVITZ, MELVIN vs. NGUYEN, TUE XUAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ENT- LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAGOVITZ, MELVIN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAGOVITZ, MELVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, TUE XUAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 725 ELLIS ST #601, LEASE FORFEITED
